minimum_wage.label: Statutory minimum wage
minimum_wage.evidence: The statutory minimum wage has been 13.90 euros gross per hour since 1 January 2026.

social_security_ceilings.label: Social security contribution assessment ceilings
social_security_ceilings.evidence: 2026 contribution assessment ceilings: health insurance 5,812.50 euros per month; general pension insurance 8,450 euros per month.

wage_tax_algorithm.label: PAP 2026 wage-tax algorithm
wage_tax_algorithm.evidence: Official Programmablaufplan for the machine calculation of wage tax, solidarity surcharge and church-tax base for 2026.

included: net wage after Lohnsteuer and Solidaritätszuschlag
Saxony and non-Saxony care contribution profiles
childless and with-child care contribution profiles
excluded_or_simplified: Minijob and Midijob specific contribution formulas

availability_decision.reason: The module combines official minimum-wage parameters, official social-security ceilings and the official BMF PAP 2026 wage-tax algorithm. Remaining limits are explicitly documented.
